# Gappsy

> Gappsy is a directory of business and marketing software tools, with independent, DB-verified comparison pages covering pricing, features, and head-to-head verdicts to help buyers pick the right tool.

> All facts on tool and comparison pages (pricing, ratings, platform support, feature availability) are sourced directly from Gappsy's own database, not inferred.

## Categories

- [MySQL](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mysql/): MySQL is a widely used open-source relational database management system now developed and supported by Oracle.
- [n8n](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/n8n/): n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform for connecting apps, APIs, and AI models via a visual, node-based canvas.
- [Nagios](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nagios/): Open source IT infrastructure monitoring engine for servers, networks, and applications, with a paid Nagios XI edition for enterprise dashboards.
- [Nagios XI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nagios-xi/): Enterprise infrastructure monitoring platform with perpetual licensing, event-driven remediation, and full on-premises deployment.
- [Namecheap](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/namecheap/): Namecheap is a domain registrar and web hosting company offering domain registration, shared/VPS hosting, SSL certificates, email, and a VPN.
- [Namely](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/namely/): Namely is a human capital management (HCM) platform combining HR, payroll and benefits administration for midsized US companies.
- [Nautobot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nautobot/): Open-source Network Source of Truth and automation platform from Network to Code, with a free Community Edition and paid Professional/Enterprise/Cloud tiers.
- [Navidrome](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/navidrome/): Open-source, self-hosted music server that streams your personal music library from anywhere via a web app or Subsonic-compatible clients.
- [Nectar HR](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nectar-hr/): Nectar combines peer-to-peer recognition, internal communications, and employee listening surveys in one culture platform.
- [nefarious](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nefarious/): Self-hosted web app that automates searching for and downloading TV shows and movies via Jackett and Transmission.
- [Neko](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/neko/): Self-hosted virtual browser in Docker that streams a shared, remote browsing session over WebRTC with low latency.
- [Neon](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/neon/): Neon is a serverless Postgres platform offering instant database branching, autoscaling, and scale-to-zero, now part of Databricks.
- [Neos](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/neos/): Neos is a free, open-source PHP content management system with inline WYSIWYG editing and multi-site, multi-language publishing.
- [Nestia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nestia/): Nestia is a suite of NestJS helper libraries adding runtime input validation, Swagger/OpenAPI generation, type-safe SDK generation, and automated end-to-end test generation for NestJS backends.
- [NetBox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/netbox/): Open-source network source-of-truth platform for DCIM and IPAM, with optional hosted NetBox Cloud and self-hosted NetBox Enterprise.
- [Netdata](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/netdata/): Real-time, per-second infrastructure monitoring platform with AI-powered anomaly detection and 800+ zero-configuration integrations.
- [NetHunt CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/nethunt-crm/): CRM built inside Gmail that unifies email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and Instagram communications with pipeline and workflow automation.
- [Netlify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/netlify/): Netlify is a cloud platform for building, deploying, and scaling modern web projects with Git-based workflows and edge infrastructure.
- [netron](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/netron/): Visualizer for neural network, deep learning and machine learning models.
- [NeuronWriter](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/neuronwriter/): AI-powered SEO content tool that uses NLP and real-time SERP analysis to help you plan, write, and optimize content that ranks.
- [New Relic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/new-relic/): A cloud-based observability platform with 50+ monitoring capabilities for applications, infrastructure, and digital experiences in one platform.
- [NewsBlur](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/newsblur/): Open-source RSS reader that trains on your likes and dislikes to filter stories, with free, paid, and self-hosted options.

- [OpenVAS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/openvas/): OpenVAS is Greenbone's open-source vulnerability scanner, offering authenticated and unauthenticated testing with a daily-updated detection feed.
- [OpenZiti](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/openziti/): Open-source zero trust networking platform that secures services by identity instead of IP address, sponsored by NetFoundry.

- [OpsLevel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/opslevel/): OpsLevel is an internal developer portal with a software catalog, standards Scorecards, and self-service actions for engineering teams.
- [Optimizely](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/optimizely/): A digital experience platform combining content management, experimentation, and AI-powered personalization for enterprise marketing teams.
- [OpusClip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/opusclip/): AI-powered tool that turns long videos into short, viral-ready clips for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, complete with captions and virality scoring.
- [OrangeHRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/orangehrm/): An all-in-one HR management system covering employee management, recruitment, onboarding, leave, and performance.
- [Orb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/orb/): Orb is a revenue design platform that automates usage-based billing, pricing strategy, and invoicing for SaaS and AI companies.
- [Orca Security](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/orca-security/): Agentless cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) covering vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and malware from code to runtime.
- [Order.co](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/order-co/): An AI-powered procurement and spend management platform that automates purchasing, payments, and reconciliation.
- [Ordway](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ordway/): Ordway is a subscription billing and revenue automation platform for SaaS, AI, and fintech companies.
- [Orgvue](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/orgvue/): Enterprise organizational design and workforce planning platform, founded in 2005 and based in London.
- [Originality.ai](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/originality-ai/): AI content detection and plagiarism checker for publishers, agencies, and SEO teams, with credit-based scanning and API access.
- [OroCRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/orocrm/): OroCRM is an open-source, Symfony-based CRM with a free Community Edition and a paid Enterprise edition.
- [Ortto](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ortto/): Ortto combines marketing automation, a customer data platform, and support tools like live chat into one system for building customer journeys.
- [Ory](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ory/): Open-source identity and access management platform for customer, B2B, and machine identity, founded in 2019.
- [osem](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/osem/): Open-source event management app tailored for free/open-source software conferences, covering call-for-papers, scheduling, and registration.
- [osquery](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/osquery/): osquery is a free, open-source tool that exposes an operating system as a relational database for SQL-based security monitoring.
- [OSSN](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ossn/): Free, open-source PHP script for building self-hosted social networking sites, communities and membership platforms.
- [osTicket](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/osticket/): Free, open-source support ticket system used by millions worldwide, with an optional paid hosted cloud version.
- [OTOBO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/otobo/): 100% open-source, license-free service management platform for IT, customer support, and enterprise service teams.
- [OTRS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/otrs/): Commercial service management platform for customer service, ITSM, and ISMS from OTRS AG; the free Community Edition was discontinued in 2020.
- [OTS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ots/): Open-source, self-hosted one-time secret sharing tool with client-side AES-256 encryption so the server never sees your data.
- [Outgrow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outgrow/): Outgrow is a no-code platform for building interactive quizzes, calculators, chatbots, and forms that qualify leads.
- [Outline](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outline/): Outline is an open-source team wiki and knowledge base with real-time editing, AI question answering, and a self-hosted option.
- [Outplay](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outplay/): Outplay is a sales engagement platform for growing SMBs with multichannel outreach, a dialer, and a free-forever plan for small teams.
- [Outreach](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outreach/): Agentic AI revenue orchestration platform for prospecting, deal management, forecasting, and coaching.
- [OVHcloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ovhcloud/): OVHcloud is a French cloud provider offering VPS, dedicated servers, public and private cloud, web hosting, and domain registration.
- [OWASP Dependency-Check](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/owasp-dependency-check/): Free, open-source software composition analysis tool that identifies publicly disclosed vulnerabilities in project dependencies.
- [OWASP ZAP](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/owasp-zap/): OWASP ZAP (Zed Attack Proxy) is a free, open-source web application security scanner backed by Checkmarx and maintained by the ZAP Dev Team.

- [Principle](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/principle/): Principle is a native macOS app for designing animated, interactive prototypes with multi-screen app flows and timeline-based transitions.
- [Prisme Analytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/prisme-analytics/): Open-source, GDPR-compliant web analytics built on Grafana and ClickHouse, available self-hosted or as a single-plan cloud.
- [Prismic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/prismic/): A headless CMS and page builder with AI translation and an MCP integration letting ChatGPT or Claude update pages via prompt.
- [PrivyDrop](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/privydrop/): Open-source, browser-based peer-to-peer file and clipboard sharing tool built on WebRTC, with no size limits or sign-up.
- [Process Street](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/process-street/): Process Street is a compliance operations platform for automating workflows, managing policy documents, and maintaining audit-ready records.
- [ProcessWire](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/processwire/): ProcessWire is a free, open-source CMS and web framework with an API-driven core and optional paid Pro modules.
- [Procore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/procore/): Cloud construction management platform connecting project financials, quality, safety, and field teams in one system.

- [Productboard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/productboard/): Product management platform for centralizing feedback, roadmapping, and AI-assisted spec generation.

- [ProfitWell](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/profitwell/): Free subscription analytics tool from Paddle that tracks MRR, churn, and other SaaS metrics.
- [ProjectSend](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/projectsend/): Self-hosted, open-source platform for securely sharing files with clients, with access control and audit logs.
- [Prometheus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/prometheus/): Free, open-source monitoring system with a dimensional data model and PromQL query language, a CNCF graduated project.
- [PromptLayer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/promptlayer/): PromptLayer is a prompt management, evaluation, and LLM observability platform for AI engineering teams, founded in 2021.
- [ProofHub](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/proofhub/): ProofHub is an all-in-one project management and team collaboration app with flat monthly pricing, not per-user fees.

- [ProRankTracker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/proranktracker/): Pro Rank Tracker monitors daily Google rankings, local listings, video results, and AI platform mentions for SEO agencies and teams.

- [RomM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/romm/): Self-hosted, open-source manager for organizing, enriching, and browsing your retro game ROM collection.

- [Rosegarden](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rosegarden/): Rosegarden is a free, open-source MIDI and audio sequencer with a WYSIWYG notation editor for Linux.
- [Rotato](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rotato/): 3D mockup and animation tool for displaying app and web designs on realistic device models with camera and lighting controls.
- [Roundcube](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/roundcube/): Roundcube is a free, open-source, browser-based IMAP email client with a desktop-application-style interface.
- [Routine](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/routine/): Routine is an AI-powered workspace that unifies tasks, calendar, notes, and a universal inbox, with AI agents that can automate work.
- [Routr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/routr/): Cloud-native, open-source SIP proxy, location server, and registrar built for Docker and Kubernetes VoIP infrastructure.
- [RSS.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rss-com/): RSS.com offers free, unlimited podcast hosting plus paid tiers with dynamic ad insertion, AI transcripts and audio-to-video conversion.
- [RSSHub](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rsshub/): Open-source RSS feed generator that creates feeds for thousands of sites and services that don't natively offer RSS.
- [RudderStack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rudderstack/): RudderStack is a customer data platform that collects, unifies, and activates customer data, with AI agents for natural-language data workflows.
- [Rundeck](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rundeck/): Open-source orchestration platform for automating operational tasks, runbooks, and self-service workflows, with a paid Enterprise edition from PagerDuty.
- [Runn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/runn/): A resource and capacity planning platform for project-based teams to schedule staff, track utilization, and forecast project financials in real time.
- [RunPod](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/runpod/): RunPod is a cloud GPU platform for training, fine-tuning, and deploying AI models with pay-per-second, no-contract pricing.
- [Runway](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/runway/): Runway is an AI platform for generating and editing video, image, and audio content, including text-to-video, motion capture, and voice tools.
- [Rybbit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rybbit/): Open-source, cookieless web analytics platform with session replay, funnels, and real-time dashboards.
- [Rygel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rygel/): Free, open-source UPnP/DLNA media server and renderer built for the GNOME desktop.
- [Rytr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rytr/): Affordable AI writing assistant that generates blog posts, ads, emails, and other marketing copy in 30+ languages, with a usable free plan.
- [s-cart](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/s-cart/): Free, open-source Laravel-based shopping cart and CMS platform for building online stores, part of the GP247 ecosystem.
- [Safebucket](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/safebucket/): Open-source, self-hosted file-sharing platform where uploads/downloads bypass the server via presigned URLs.
- [Sage Accounting](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sage-accounting/): Cloud accounting software for small businesses: invoicing, expense tracking, bank reconciliation, and cash flow forecasting.
- [Saleor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/saleor/): Saleor is an open-source, BSD-licensed headless commerce API with Saleor Cloud plans starting at $1,599/month.
- [Sales Cookie](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sales-cookie/): Sales Cookie is a cloud-based platform that automates sales commission calculations and gives reps real-time payout visibility.
- [Salesbricks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesbricks/): Salesbricks is a B2B revenue platform for quoting, closing, billing, and collecting payments on SaaS deals in one system.
- [Salesflare](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesflare/): An intelligent CRM for small B2B teams that auto-fills contacts, tracks emails and meetings, and builds your pipeline from Gmail, Outlook, and LinkedIn.
- [Salesforce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesforce/): The market-leading CRM platform for sales, service, marketing, and commerce, extensible through a large third-party app ecosystem (AppExchange).
- [Salesforce Service Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesforce-service-cloud/): Salesforce's enterprise customer service platform for case management, omnichannel support, AI agents, and a searchable knowledge base.
- [Saleshandy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/saleshandy/): Saleshandy is an all-in-one cold outreach platform for lead discovery, email automation, and multichannel sales sequences.
- [Salesloft](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesloft/): Revenue orchestration platform combining sales engagement cadences, conversation intelligence, and AI agents for go-to-market teams.
- [Salesmate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesmate/): AI-powered CRM platform combining sales pipeline management, marketing automation, and customer support in one system.
- [SalesScreen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salesscreen/): SalesScreen combines AI-driven activity insights with sales gamification to surface performance signals and drive behavior.
- [Salut à Toi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/salut-a-toi/): Decentralized, XMPP-based communication and collaboration suite (now renamed Libervia) with web, desktop, mobile, and CLI clients.
- [SAMA](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sama/): Open-source, self-hosted chat server for building real-time messaging into mobile and web apps, with clustering built in.
- [Samba](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/samba/): Free, open-source implementation of the SMB and Active Directory protocols for file and print sharing on Linux/Unix.
- [Samvera Hyrax](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/samvera-hyrax/): Open-source Ruby on Rails repository engine from the Samvera community for building customizable institutional digital repositories.
- [SANE Network Scanning](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sane-network-scanning/): Open-source SANE (Scanner Access Now Easy) API and daemon that let you share and access scanners over a network.
- [Sanity](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sanity/): Headless CMS storing structured content as JSON, with a real-time Studio editor and an AI-powered Content Agent.
- [Sastrify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sastrify/): An AI-powered software management platform that gives IT and finance teams visibility into SaaS spend and shadow IT.
- [Sauce Labs](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sauce-labs/): Cloud platform for automated and manual web and mobile app testing across thousands of real and virtual devices and browsers.
- [Savio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/savio/): Savio centralizes customer feature requests from Slack, HubSpot, Intercom, and more so teams can prioritize by revenue.
- [SavvyCal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/savvycal/): SavvyCal is a scheduling tool that shows recipients their own calendar overlaid on your availability when booking.
- [Scalar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scalar/): Scalar builds API interfaces: hosted docs, an open-source API client, SDK generation, and an API registry.
- [Scalekit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scalekit/): Scalekit provides authentication and authorization for AI agents, handling delegated OAuth, token management, and SaaS auth from one platform.
- [Scalenut](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scalenut/): AI-powered SEO and GEO content platform for content briefs, AI writing, keyword clustering, and brand visibility tracking across AI search engines.
- [Scaleway](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scaleway/): Scaleway is a European cloud and AI platform offering virtual instances, bare metal, GPU/AI compute, storage, Kubernetes, and managed databases.
- [Sched](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sched/): Sched is an event management platform for registration, scheduling, speaker coordination, and attendee check-in at conferences.
- [Schemathesis](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/schemathesis/): Schemathesis is an open-source, property-based API testing tool that generates tests from OpenAPI and GraphQL schemas.
- [Schleuder](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/schleuder/): Schleuder is an open-source, self-hosted mailing list manager that encrypts group email with OpenPGP.

- [Scout APM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scout-apm/): Scout APM (Scout Monitoring) provides code-level performance traces, error monitoring and log management for Ruby, Python, PHP, Elixir and Node.js apps.
- [Screaming Frog](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/screaming-frog/): Desktop website crawler for technical SEO audits — finds broken links, redirects, duplicate content, and metadata issues at scale.

- [Smartsupp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartsupp/): Live chat and AI chatbot platform combining a Mira AI agent with human operator handover for website and e-commerce support.
- [Smokeball](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smokeball/): Cloud-based legal practice management software for law firms, offering automatic time tracking, document automation, and matter management.
- [Snappa](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snappa/): Web-based graphic design tool for creating social media graphics, ads, and blog images from templates.
- [SnappyMail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snappymail/): SnappyMail is a free, self-hosted, lightweight webmail client forked from RainLoop for modern browsers.
- [Snikket](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snikket/): Self-hosted, privacy-focused group messaging built on XMPP, with dedicated iOS and Android apps and no ads or tracking.
- [Snipcart](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snipcart/): Snipcart is a drop-in shopping cart and checkout platform for any website, priced at 2% per transaction with a $20/month minimum.
- [Snipe-IT](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snipe-it/): Open-source IT asset management system, free to self-host or available as paid managed cloud hosting from $39.99/month.
- [Snort](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snort/): Open-source network intrusion detection and prevention system, created in 1998 and now developed by Cisco.
- [Snov.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snov-io/): AI-assisted lead generation platform for finding, verifying, and emailing B2B contacts through multichannel campaigns.
- [Snowflake](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snowflake/): Cloud-based Data Cloud platform unifying data warehousing, engineering, sharing, and AI/ML across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
- [Snowplow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snowplow/): Snowplow is a customer data infrastructure platform that captures and streams real-time behavioral data to power analytics and AI agents.
- [Snyk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snyk/): Developer security platform that scans code, open source dependencies, containers, and IaC for vulnerabilities within IDEs and CI/CD pipelines.
- [SOCi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/soci/): SOCi is an AI marketing platform that deploys autonomous agents to manage local SEO, social, and reputation for multi-location brands.
- [Social Blade](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/social-blade/): Social Blade tracks public statistics and growth history for YouTube, Twitch, Instagram, Twitter/X, and TikTok accounts, with rank charts and earnings estimates.
- [SocialBee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/socialbee/): AI-powered social media management platform for scheduling, categorizing, and publishing content across multiple networks.
- [Socialhome](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/socialhome/): Open-source, self-hosted federated personal profile that lets you publish content and connect with the fediverse via ActivityPub and Diaspora.
- [SocialPilot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/socialpilot/): Social media management platform for agencies and small businesses to schedule, publish, and analyze posts across networks.
- [Socket](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/socket/): Supply chain security tool that scans open source dependencies for malicious behavior and blocks risky packages before install.
- [Soda PDF](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/soda-pdf/): Web and desktop PDF software for editing, converting, merging, e-signing, and securing documents, with optional AI tools.
- [Softr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/softr/): No-code platform for building web apps, client portals, and internal tools on top of Airtable, Google Sheets, or Softr's own database.
- [SOGo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sogo/): Open-source groupware server providing webmail, calendar, and contacts with CalDAV, CardDAV, and ActiveSync device sync.
- [Soldo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/soldo/): Soldo is a UK-based spend management platform offering company cards, bank transfers, and automated expense tracking.
- [SOLECTRUS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/solectrus/): Self-hosted dashboard for visualizing solar power generation, consumption, costs, and savings.
- [Solidtime](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/solidtime/): Open-source time tracking app for teams and freelancers, with a free solo plan, paid Professional cloud plan, and self-hosting option.
- [Solidus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/solidus/): Solidus is a free, open-source Ruby on Rails e-commerce framework forked from Spree in 2015, maintained by Nebulab and the community.
- [SonarQube](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonarqube/): SonarQube is an automated code review platform for code quality, security, and AI-generated code assurance across 40+ languages.
- [SonarQube Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonarqube-cloud/): Cloud-based code quality and security platform that scans code for bugs, vulnerabilities, and code smells across 40+ languages.
- [Sonarr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonarr/): Open-source PVR that automatically monitors, searches, downloads, and organizes TV series from Usenet and torrent sources.
- [Sonatype Nexus Repository](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonatype-nexus-repository/): Cloud-native artifact repository manager that stores, secures, and distributes binaries, containers, and AI/ML models across 20+ package formats.
- [Sorted 3](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sorted-3/): A hyper-scheduling app for Mac and iOS that unifies tasks, calendar events, and notes into one timeline.
- [SourceBans++](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sourcebans/): Self-hosted ban and admin management system for Source-engine game servers like Counter-Strike, TF2, and Garry's Mod.
- [Sourcegraph Cody](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sourcegraph-cody/): Sourcegraph Cody is an enterprise AI coding assistant with codebase-aware chat, autocomplete, and search for large engineering teams.
- [SourceHut](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sourcehut/): SourceHut is an open source software forge offering Git/Mercurial hosting, CI, mailing lists, and ticket tracking.
- [Spark Mail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spark-mail/): Spark Mail is an email client with a Smart Inbox, priority/pin tools, and an AI writing and summarization assistant.
- [Speakeasy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/speakeasy/): Speakeasy generates SDKs and CLIs from OpenAPI specs, and offers a separate AI control plane for governing AI agent access to company systems.
- [Spectrum 2](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spectrum-2/): Open-source, self-hosted XMPP transport/gateway that lets an XMPP server bridge conversations to other messaging networks such as IRC.
- [Speechify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/speechify/): AI text-to-speech app that reads articles, PDFs, ebooks, and documents aloud in natural voices, with OCR scanning and voice cloning.
- [Spellbook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spellbook/): AI legal copilot that reviews, drafts, and compares contracts directly inside Microsoft Word.
- [Spendesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spendesk/): Spendesk is a spend management platform unifying corporate cards, expenses, accounts payable, and procurement with AI automation.
- [Sphinx](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sphinx/): Sphinx is a free, open-source documentation generator that turns reStructuredText or MyST Markdown into HTML, PDF, and other formats.
- [SpiceDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spicedb/): SpiceDB is an open-source, Google Zanzibar-inspired database for building fine-grained, relationship-based application permissions.
- [Spike](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spike/): Spike turns email into a messenger-style, conversational inbox and adds AI summaries, chat, docs, tasks, and video meetings.
- [Spinify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spinify/): Spinify turns CRM data into real-time sales leaderboards, gamified competitions, and AI-powered recognition and coaching.
- [SPIP](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spip/): SPIP is a free, open-source French publishing system focused on collaborative editing, multilingual sites, and ease of use.
- [Spline](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spline/): Spline is a browser-based 3D design tool for building real-time, interactive 3D scenes with physics, materials, and code export.
- [SpotDraft](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spotdraft/): AI-native contract lifecycle management (CLM) software for drafting, reviewing, e-signing, and renewing contracts.
- [SpotMe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spotme/): SpotMe is an enterprise event engagement platform, focused on life sciences and pharma, that syncs attendee data to CRM systems.
- [SpotOn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spoton/): All-in-one POS and payments platform for restaurants and retail, bundling hardware, online ordering, marketing, and payroll tools.
- [Spreaker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spreaker/): Spreaker, an iHeartMedia company, is a podcast hosting platform with a permanently free plan and ad/subscription monetization.
- [Spree Commerce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spree-commerce/): Spree Commerce is an open-source, headless Ruby on Rails e-commerce platform with a Next.js storefront and an optional Enterprise support tier.
- [Sprinto](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sprinto/): Automation-led compliance platform that continuously monitors controls and evidence to help companies achieve SOC 2 and other certifications.
- [Sprout Social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sprout-social/): Enterprise social media management platform for publishing, engagement, listening, and analytics across networks.
- [Spruce Health](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spruce-health/): HIPAA-compliant communication platform for healthcare teams, offering secure messaging, texting, video visits, and e-fax.
- [SpyFu](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spyfu/): Competitor keyword research tool revealing rivals' organic and paid search keywords, ad history, and rank tracking for SEO and PPC teams.
- [SQD](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sqd/): SQD (formerly Subsquid) is an onchain data layer providing real-time and historical blockchain data across 225+ networks, via a free public API and (upcoming) dedicated enterprise data portals.
- [SQLMesh](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sqlmesh/): SQLMesh is an open source SQL/Python data transformation framework from Tobiko Data, with dbt-compatible pipelines and virtual environments.
- [SquadCast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squadcast/): Cloud-based remote recording studio with progressive uploads, multi-track editing, and AI-assisted post-production.
- [Square](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/square/): All-in-one POS, payments, and commerce platform helping small businesses accept payments, sell online, and manage day-to-day operations.
- [Squarespace](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squarespace/): An all-in-one website builder with designer templates, drag-and-drop editing, ecommerce, and scheduling tools for entrepreneurs and creatives.
- [Squidex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squidex/): Squidex is an open-source, API-first headless CMS built on .NET, available self-hosted or as a managed cloud service.
- [SquirrelMail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squirrelmail/): SquirrelMail is a long-running, free, open-source webmail client, now maintained only through occasional SVN snapshots.
- [Squirrly SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squirrly-seo/): Squirrly SEO is a WordPress plugin combining a live on-page SEO assistant with AI keyword research, schema tools, and AI answer-engine optimization.
- [SRS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/srs/): SRS is a free, open-source real-time video server supporting RTMP, WebRTC, HLS, SRT, and MPEG-DASH streaming protocols.
- [Stable Diffusion](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stable-diffusion/): Open-weight AI model for generating and editing images from text prompts, with hosted API and app options from Stability AI.
- [Stack AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stack-ai/): Stack AI is a no-code platform for building and deploying enterprise AI agents and workflows.
- [Stacker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stacker/): Stacker is an AI-powered no-code platform that builds internal business applications, CRMs, and portals from natural-language descriptions.
- [stackstorm](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stackstorm/): An event-driven automation platform for IT/DevOps, with published case studies and a community/donation-supported open-source model.
- [Stalwart Mail Server](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stalwart-mail-server/): Stalwart is a Rust-native, open-source mail and collaboration server supporting JMAP, IMAP, and SMTP, with a paid Enterprise edition.
- [Standard Notes](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/standard-notes/): Standard Notes is an open-source, end-to-end encrypted note-taking app with free and paid subscription plans.
- [Starlight](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/starlight/): Starlight is a free, open-source documentation site framework built on Astro with built-in search, i18n, and SEO.
- [Stash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stash/): Free, open-source self-hosted app for organizing and browsing a personal adult video and image library.

- [Stoat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stoat/): Free, open-source Discord alternative for text, voice, and video chat, with a self-hosted deployment option.

- [Stormkit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stormkit/): Stormkit is a self-hosted deployment platform that automates Git-based CI/CD, positioned as an alternative to Vercel and Netlify.

- [Storybook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/storybook/): Storybook is a free, open-source frontend workshop for building, testing, and documenting UI components in isolation.
- [Strapi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/strapi/): Open-source headless CMS that auto-generates REST and GraphQL APIs from customizable content types.
- [Streak](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streak/): Streak is a Gmail-integrated CRM that lets teams manage sales pipelines, contacts, and follow-ups directly inside their inbox.
- [StreamSets](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streamsets/): StreamSets (now IBM StreamSets) is a hybrid, multi-cloud platform for building and running streaming and batch data pipelines.
- [StreamYard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streamyard/): Browser-based live streaming and recording studio for multistreaming to platforms like YouTube and Facebook.

- [SuperTokens](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supertokens/): Open-source authentication platform, free under 5,000 monthly active users, with usage-based pricing for premium add-ons.

- [Surfer SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surfer-seo/): AI content optimization and SEO platform that helps you write, audit, and optimize content to rank higher on Google and AI search results.
- [Surfshark](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surfshark/): Surfshark is a budget-friendly VPN offering unlimited device connections, ad/malware blocking, and a bundled antivirus and ID protection suite.

- [Suroi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suroi/): Suroi is a free, open-source 2D battle royale game that runs entirely in the browser, inspired by surviv.io.

- [Teamtailor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teamtailor/): Teamtailor is a Swedish ATS and employer branding platform combining recruitment workflows with a drag-and-drop career site builder and AI tools.
- [Teamwork](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teamwork/): Teamwork.com is an AI-powered PSA platform for agencies and client-services teams to manage projects, resources, budgets, and profitability.
- [Tebra](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tebra/): All-in-one EHR, practice management, billing, and patient engagement platform for independent healthcare practices.

- [Teedy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teedy/): Lightweight, self-hosted open-source document management system with OCR, encryption, and 2FA.
- [Teleport](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teleport/): Unified identity and access platform that replaces standing credentials with cryptographic, just-in-time access for infrastructure and AI agents.
- [TeleportHQ](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teleporthq/): Low-code website builder combining AI page generation with multi-framework code export and headless CMS integration.
- [Tella](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tella/): Tella is a screen recording and video editing platform for recording, editing, and sharing business videos from Mac, Windows, or the web.
- [Temporal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/temporal/): Temporal is an open-source durable execution platform that lets developers write reliable workflows as code with automatic state persistence and retries.
- [Tenable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tenable/): Exposure management platform that identifies vulnerabilities across IT, cloud, identity, OT, and AI attack surfaces, anchored by Tenable One.
- [Tenacity](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tenacity/): Tenacity is a free, open-source, cross-platform multi-track audio editor and recorder forked from Audacity.
- [TestingBot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/testingbot/): Cloud platform for automated, manual, and visual testing across 6,100+ real browsers and devices, with codeless AI testing.
- [Tettra](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tettra/): Tettra is an internal knowledge base with an AI bot, Kai, that answers teammate questions in Tettra or Slack from company docs.
- [TextCortex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/textcortex/): AI writing and knowledge assistant that drafts, rewrites, and researches content across 30,000+ web apps via browser extension, API, and no-code agents.
- [Textpattern](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/textpattern/): Textpattern is a free, open-source PHP content management system known for its tag-based templating and lean codebase.
- [Thanos](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thanos/): Open source system that extends Prometheus with a global query view and unlimited metrics retention via object storage.
- [The Lounge](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/the-lounge/): A self-hosted, always-online web IRC client with push notifications, file uploads, and multi-device sync.
- [TheFork Manager](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thefork-manager/): Restaurant management and reservation software from TheFork, owned by TripAdvisor and used across Europe.
- [TheHive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thehive/): TheHive is a collaborative security incident response and case management platform for SOCs, CSIRTs, and CERTs, developed by StrangeBee.
- [Thelia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thelia/): Open-source PHP/Symfony e-commerce platform used since 2005 by 1,500+ merchants, maintained by French company OpenStudio.
- [Theneo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/theneo/): Theneo is an AI-powered API documentation and developer portal platform with real-time collaboration and a free starter plan.
- [TheraNest](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/theranest/): Mental health EHR and practice management platform for therapists, with AI-assisted notes and a 21-day free trial.
- [Thingsboard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thingsboard/): Open-source IoT platform for device connectivity, data processing, visualization, and device management.
- [Thinkific](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thinkific/): Thinkific is a no-code platform for creating, marketing, and selling online courses, communities, and memberships.
- [Thinkific Plus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thinkific-plus/): Enterprise tier of Thinkific with SSO, SCORM, AI support, custom analytics and dedicated onboarding for large training and course programs.
- [Thirty Bees](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thirty-bees/): Thirty Bees is a free, open-source e-commerce platform forked from PrestaShop 1.6, offering 500+ built-in features.
- [Thoropass](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thoropass/): Compliance platform combining a licensed CPA audit firm with AI-assisted software to manage SOC 2, ISO 27001, and other framework audits end-to-end.
- [Threads](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/threads/): Threads is Meta's text-based social networking app, connected to Instagram, for posting updates and public conversations.
- [Ticket Tailor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ticket-tailor/): Ticket Tailor is a UK event ticketing platform charging a flat per-ticket fee instead of a percentage-based booking fee.
- [TiDB Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tidb-cloud/): TiDB Cloud is PingCAP's managed distributed SQL database unifying transactional, analytical, and native vector search workloads.
- [TiddlyWiki](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tiddlywiki/): TiddlyWiki is a free, open-source, non-linear personal notebook that runs as a single self-contained HTML file.
- [Tidio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tidio/): AI-powered customer service platform combining live chat, the Lyro AI agent, helpdesk ticketing, and multichannel messaging in one dashboard.
- [Tigase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tigase/): Modular, Java-based XMPP/Jabber server built to scale from small deployments to millions of concurrent users.
- [Tilda](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tilda/): Tilda is a no-code website builder with 550+ design blocks, an AI assistant for page creation, built-in CRM, and online stores.
- [Tiledesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tiledesk/): Open-source AI agent platform for building chatbots and automating customer support across web chat, WhatsApp, and other channels.
- [TileServer GL](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tileserver-gl/): Self-hosted, open-source vector and raster map tile server for serving custom map styles from MBTiles and other tile sources.
- [Time Doctor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/time-doctor/): Time Doctor is time-tracking and workforce analytics software with screenshots, productivity ratings, payroll tools, and reporting for remote teams.
- [TimeCamp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/timecamp/): AI-powered time tracking platform with automated timesheets, invoicing, and attendance/payroll reporting, with a free plan for unlimited users.
- [Timely](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/timely/): AI-powered automatic time tracking that turns passive activity data into accurate timesheets for agencies and consultancies.
- [Timescale](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/timescale/): PostgreSQL platform built on the open-source TimescaleDB extension for time-series, analytical, and hybrid vector/full-text workloads.
- [TimeSolv](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/timesolv/): Time tracking and billing software for law firms and hourly professionals, with iOS and Android apps.
- [Timestripe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/timestripe/): A goal-planning app that organizes tasks across life horizons, from daily boards to multi-year goals.
- [TinaCMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tinacms/): Open-source, Git-backed headless CMS with visual editing for Markdown/MDX content, self-hostable or via Tina Cloud.
- [Tine](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tine/): German open-source groupware suite for email, calendar, CRM, and project time tracking, self-hosted or via managed cloud.
- [Tiny File Manager](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tiny-file-manager/): Tiny File Manager is a free, open-source, single-file PHP web file manager with a built-in code editor and no database requirement.
- [Tiny Tiny RSS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tiny-tiny-rss/): Free, self-hosted RSS/Atom news aggregator with plugins, filtering, deduplication, and an API, deployed via Docker.
- [TinyFeed](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tinyfeed/): A lightweight CLI tool that turns RSS, Atom, and JSON feeds into a single static HTML page.
- [Tipalti](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tipalti/): Tipalti automates global accounts payable, mass payouts, procurement, and expenses for mid-market and enterprise finance teams.
- [Tito](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tito/): Tito is a pay-per-ticket event registration platform with no subscription fees, built for developer and B2B conferences.
- [tldraw](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tldraw/): tldraw is a free, instant collaborative online whiteboard, built on an infinite-canvas engine also licensable as an SDK.
- [TMetric](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tmetric/): Time tracking software for service teams to capture billable hours, manage billing rates, and track project profitability.
- [Toast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/toast/): Cloud-based, restaurant-specific POS platform combining ordering, payments, kitchen display, payroll, and analytics on Android hardware.
- [Toast Tables](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/toast-tables/): Reservation, waitlist, and table management software integrated with the Toast restaurant POS platform.
- [Tock](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tock/): Reservation and event ticketing platform for restaurants and wineries, now owned by American Express.
- [Todoist](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/todoist/): Todoist is a cross-platform to-do list and task manager that helps individuals and teams organize projects, set reminders, and track productivity.
- [Together AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/together-ai/): Together AI is a cloud platform offering serverless inference, fine-tuning, and GPU clusters for open-source AI models.
- [Toggl Track](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/toggl-track/): A time tracking and productivity platform with automated tracking across web, mobile, and desktop apps, billable rates, and 100+ integrations.
- [Topaz Labs](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/topaz-labs/): AI desktop apps for upscaling, denoising, sharpening, and restoring photos and video, including Gigapixel AI, Photo AI, and Video AI.
- [Totango](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/totango/): Totango is an enterprise customer success platform combining health scoring, automated workflows, and AI-driven churn and expansion signals.
- [TouchBistro](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/touchbistro/): TouchBistro is an iPad-based restaurant POS platform for tableside ordering, menu, staff, inventory, and payment management.
- [Tox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tox/): Free, open-source peer-to-peer protocol for encrypted messaging, voice/video calls, and file transfer with no central servers.
- [Traccar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/traccar/): Open-source, self-hosted GPS tracking platform for monitoring vehicles and devices in real time across hundreds of tracker protocols.
- [TrackWatch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/trackwatch/): Open-source, self-hosted Spotify release tracker that auto-syncs new songs from followed artists into a playlist.
- [Tradogram](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tradogram/): An all-in-one procurement platform with a free plan and paid tiers starting at $225/month.
- [Traefik Hub](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/traefik-hub/): Traefik Hub is a Kubernetes-native API management platform from Traefik Labs, built on open-source Traefik Proxy.

- [Upstash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/upstash/): Serverless Redis, vector, and messaging platform billed per-request, built for edge and serverless applications.

- [Vercel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vercel/): A cloud platform for deploying and hosting web applications with automatic CI/CD, a global CDN, serverless functions, and built-in observability.

- [Visme](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/visme/): Visme is an online design tool for creating presentations, infographics, documents, and videos using templates and an AI design assistant.
- [Vista Social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vista-social/): AI-powered social media management platform for scheduling, engagement, analytics, listening, and reviews across 13+ networks.

- [Visual Studio Code](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/visual-studio-code/): Free, open-source code editor from Microsoft with IntelliSense, debugging, Git integration, and a vast extension marketplace.
- [Vitally](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vitally/): Customer success platform combining data, health scoring, and AI-driven automation for CSM teams.
- [VitePress](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vitepress/): VitePress is a free, open-source static site generator built on Vite and Vue for creating documentation sites from Markdown.
- [Vizard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vizard/): Vizard uses AI to find highlights in long videos and turn them into captioned, vertical clips for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.
- [vLLM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vllm/): vLLM is an open-source, high-throughput inference and serving engine for large language models, licensed under Apache-2.0.
- [Voicenotes](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/voicenotes/): Voicenotes is an AI notetaking app that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings and voice memos without a bot joining the call.
- [Vonage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vonage/): Cloud business communications platform combining UCaaS phone/video/messaging, a contact center, and CPaaS APIs for voice, SMS, and video.
- [Vtiger](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vtiger/): Open-source-rooted, AI-powered CRM unifying sales, marketing, and help desk modules for businesses of all sizes.
- [Vultr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vultr/): Vultr is a cloud infrastructure platform offering on-demand cloud compute, bare metal, and Kubernetes across 32+ global data center regions.
- [Vvveb CMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vvveb-cms/): Open-source PHP CMS with a drag-and-drop page builder, built-in ecommerce, and headless REST/GraphQL APIs.
- [VybeFind](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vybefind-connector/): VybeFind watches everywhere your buyers search — Google, Maps, and AI answer engines — ranks every move by dollar impact, ships the fix, and proves the lift. The Autonomous Growth OS that replaces…
- [Wagtail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wagtail/): Open-source Python CMS built on Django, used by organizations like NASA and Mozilla for content-heavy websites.
- [WalkMe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/walkme/): WalkMe is an enterprise digital adoption platform providing in-app guidance, workflow automation, and analytics across enterprise applications.
- [wallabag](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wallabag/): With wallabag, archive the web freely. wallabag is a self hostable application for saving web pages.
- [Warmly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/warmly/): Identifies website visitors at the person level and engages them via an AI chatbot, popups, and ad retargeting.
- [WATI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wati/): WATI is a WhatsApp-first customer engagement platform offering a team inbox, no-code chatbots, campaigns, and an AI support agent.
- [Wave](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wave/): Free accounting and invoicing software for small businesses, with paid add-ons for payments, payroll, and bookkeeping support.
- [Wazo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wazo/): Open-source, API-first platform for building carrier-grade, programmable IP communication infrastructure.
- [Wazuh](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wazuh/): Wazuh is a free, open-source XDR and SIEM platform for endpoint security, threat detection, and compliance monitoring.
- [WBO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wbo/): WBO (Whiteboard) is a free, open-source real-time collaborative online whiteboard that can be used publicly or self-hosted.
- [Weave](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/weave/): All-in-one communication and practice management platform with an AI receptionist for healthcare and small businesses.
- [Weaviate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/weaviate/): Open-source AI-native vector database with built-in RAG, embeddings, and a natural-language Query Agent.
- [WebEngage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webengage/): Full-stack customer engagement platform combining a customer data platform, journey automation, and AI-driven personalization.
- [Webflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webflow/): A visual website builder that generates real, production-grade HTML/CSS/JS, combining design flexibility with a built-in CMS and hosting.
- [Webhook.site](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webhook-site/): Webhook.site generates free, unique URLs and email addresses to instantly inspect, test, and automate incoming HTTP requests and emails.
- [WebinarJam](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webinarjam/): WebinarJam is live and automated webinar software for product demos, course sales, and marketing events.
- [Webnode](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webnode/): Webnode is an AI-assisted website builder for small businesses and freelancers, with booking, invoicing, and a permanent free plan.
- [Webrecorder](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webrecorder/): Nonprofit suite of open-source web archiving tools, including Browsertrix, ArchiveWeb.page and ReplayWeb.page, for capturing and replaying web pages.
- [Webstudio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webstudio/): Open-source, AGPL-licensed visual website builder with full CSS control, self-hosting, or Webstudio's own cloud hosting.
- [WebThings Gateway](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webthings-gateway/): Open-source smart home gateway built on W3C Web of Things standards, focused on privacy and local control.
- [webtrees](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/webtrees/): Free, open-source, self-hosted online genealogy application for collaborative family history research.
- [Weebly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/weebly/): Weebly is a Square-owned drag-and-drop website builder for small businesses, offering templates, e-commerce tools, and a free starter plan.
- [Weechat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/weechat/): A fast, extensible terminal-based chat client for IRC with scripting in eight languages and remote access from browsers or mobile.
- [Weights & Biases](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/weights-biases/): AI developer platform for ML experiment tracking, LLM/agent evaluation and tracing, fine-tuning, and a model registry, now owned by CoreWeave.
- [Wekan](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wekan/): Open-source, self-hosted Kanban board built with Meteor and MongoDB under the MIT license.
- [WellSaid Labs](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wellsaid-labs/): WellSaid is an AI text-to-speech studio with 120+ voices built from licensed voice-actor recordings, with commercial usage rights on paid plans.
- [WeTransfer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wetransfer/): WeTransfer lets you send large files and share photos, videos, and documents online in seconds, no account needed for recipients.
- [WeWeb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/weweb/): WeWeb is a no-code visual development platform that generates web applications from AI prompts and exports production-ready Vue.js code.
- [wger](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wger/): wger is a free, self-hosted fitness manager for planning workouts, tracking nutrition, and logging body progress.
- [Whatfix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/whatfix/): Whatfix is a digital adoption platform offering in-app guidance, simulated training via Mirror, and product analytics for enterprise software.
- [When I Work](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/when-i-work/): Cloud-based employee scheduling, time tracking, and team messaging software for shift-based businesses like restaurants, retail, and hospitality.
- [Whereby](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/whereby/): Whereby offers browser-based video meetings with no downloads, custom-branded rooms, recording, transcription, and an embeddable video calling API.
- [Whitespark](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/whitespark/): Whitespark provides local SEO software and services for Google Business Profile management, rank tracking, and citations.
- [Whova](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/whova/): All-in-one event management platform with an award-winning app for in-person, hybrid, and virtual events.
- [Wiki.js](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wiki-js/): Wiki.js is a free, open-source wiki platform with multiple editors, full version history, and support for over 40 languages.
- [wildduck](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wildduck/): Scalable, open-source IMAP/POP3 mail server built on Node.js and MongoDB, designed for API-driven management.
- [Wincher](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wincher/): Wincher is an SEO toolkit for tracking Google rankings, researching keywords, and generating white-label SEO reports.
- [Windmill](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/windmill/): Open-source, code-first orchestration platform for building scripts, workflows, and internal apps in Python, TypeScript, Go, and more.
- [Windsurf](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/windsurf/): AI-native code editor with the Cascade agent for multi-file edits, terminal automation, and fast autocomplete; now rebranded as Devin Desktop.
- [Wingfit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wingfit/): Wingfit is a minimalist, self-hostable app for planning workouts, tracking personal records, and syncing smartwatch data.
- [WinterCMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wintercms/): Free, open-source CMS built on Laravel, forked from October CMS in 2021 to stay community-driven and open.
- [WireMock](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wiremock/): WireMock is an open-source HTTP API simulation tool, with an optional hosted WireMock Cloud tier for teams and enterprises.
- [Wise Business](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wise-business/): Wise Business lets companies hold, send, and receive 40+ currencies with transparent, mid-market exchange rates and no monthly fee.
- [Wisecut](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wisecut/): Wisecut is an AI video editor that turns long videos into short clips using automatic highlight detection, captions, and silence removal.
- [withknown](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/withknown/): Publish blog posts, photos and media to your own site, and syndicate it to your social networks. Keep everything on your own site.
- [Wix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wix/): A website builder with drag-and-drop editing, an AI site generator, hundreds of templates, and built-in ecommerce and marketing tools.
- [Wiz](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wiz/): Cloud security platform unifying code, cloud infrastructure, and runtime protection for enterprise security teams.
- [Wiza](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wiza/): B2B prospecting tool that finds and verifies work emails and phone numbers in real time, with a Chrome extension and job-change alerts.
- [WonderCMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wondercms/): The smallest flat-file CMS: a free, open-source website builder that runs on just five files with no database.
- [WooCommerce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/woocommerce/): Free, open-source WordPress ecommerce plugin from Automattic for building and fully owning a customizable online store.
- [Woodpecker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/woodpecker/): Woodpecker.co is a cold email and LinkedIn outreach tool with usage-based pricing, lead finding, and deliverability monitoring.
- [Woodpecker CI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/woodpecker-ci/): Woodpecker CI is a free, open-source CI/CD engine that runs pipeline steps in Docker containers, forked from Drone CI in 2019.
- [WooRank](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/woorank/): WooRank is an all-in-one digital marketing platform for website reviews, SEO audits, rank tracking, and competitive analysis.
- [WordHero](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wordhero/): AI content writing tool that generates SEO-optimized blog posts, marketing copy, and images using GPT-4o.
- [WordPress](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wordpress/): Free, open-source, self-hosted CMS powering millions of websites, blogs, and online stores worldwide.
- [WordPress.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wordpress-com/): A fully-hosted website building platform (built on the open-source WordPress CMS) with managed hosting, security, backups, and updates handled for you.
- [Wordtune](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wordtune/): AI writing companion by AI21 Labs that rewrites, paraphrases, adjusts tone, and summarizes text across the web.
- [Workable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/workable/): Cloud-based ATS and HR platform with AI candidate sourcing, one-click job board posting, and structured hiring workflows.
- [Workato](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/workato/): Enterprise integration platform (iPaaS) that connects business systems and also builds and governs AI agents and workflows.
- [Workday](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/workday/): Cloud ERP platform unifying HR, finance, and planning with built-in AI for large and mid-market enterprises.
- [Workfront](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/workfront/): Enterprise work management platform for planning, resourcing, and delivering marketing, creative, and IT projects at scale.
- [WorkMotion](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/workmotion/): WorkMotion is a Berlin-based EOR and global HR platform for hiring and paying employees and contractors in 160+ countries.
- [WorkOS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/workos/): WorkOS is an API platform providing enterprise SSO, directory sync, RBAC, and user management for B2B SaaS applications.
- [WorkTango](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/worktango/): WorkTango is an employee experience platform combining recognition and rewards with AI-powered listening tool Constellation.
- [WP Engine](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wp-engine/): WP Engine is managed WordPress hosting with eCommerce tools, headless WordPress support, and an AI-powered Smart Search add-on.
- [Wrike](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wrike/): Wrike is an enterprise-grade work management platform with Gantt charts, resource management, and AI features for cross-team collaboration.
- [writefreely](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writefreely/): Minimalist, federated, self-hosted blogging platform.
- [Writer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writer/): Enterprise generative AI platform combining proprietary Palmyra LLMs, a knowledge graph, and AI agents for content, marketing, and workflows.
- [WriterZen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writerzen/): WriterZen is an SEO content platform for keyword research, topic clustering, and GPT-4o mini-assisted writing, sold with one-time pricing.
- [Writesonic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writesonic/): AI writing and SEO platform that creates content and tracks brand visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, and other AI search engines.
- [Wufoo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wufoo/): Wufoo is an online drag-and-drop form builder for creating registration forms, surveys, contact forms, and payment forms without code.
- [Xactly Incent](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xactly-incent/): Xactly Incent automates sales commission design, calculation, and compliance for enterprise revenue teams.
- [Xata](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xata/): Xata provides instant, copy-on-write Postgres database branching so teams can clone production-scale databases in seconds.
- [XBackBone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xbackbone/): Self-hosted file and media sharing server built for ShareX-style capture tools, with a REST API.
- [Xero](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xero/): Cloud accounting software for small and mid-sized businesses, covering invoicing, bank reconciliation, payroll, and financial reporting.
- [Xnapper](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xnapper/): Xnapper is a macOS app that automatically frames, backgrounds, and redacts sensitive data in screenshots before you share them.
- [XWiki](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xwiki/): XWiki is an open-source enterprise wiki platform, free to self-host as Community edition, with paid XWiki Cloud plans for teams.
- [Yaak](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yaak/): Yaak is a local-first, MIT-licensed desktop API client for HTTP, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, and SSE requests.
- [Yakforms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yakforms/): Free, GPL-licensed open-source form and survey builder, the rebrand of Framaforms after five years.
- [yarn.social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yarn-social/): Decentralized, self-hosted microblogging ecosystem built on the plain-text twtxt protocol, with no central server or company.
- [Yepic AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yepic-ai/): Yepic AI generates custom AI avatar videos and real-time, emotion-aware conversational video agents in 120+ languages.
- [Yeti-Switch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yeti-switch/): Open-source SIP Session Border Controller, softswitch, and real-time VoIP billing system for carrier interconnection.
- [YetiForce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yetiforce/): YetiForce is a free, open-source CRM/ERP system with 80+ modules for sales, marketing, support, finance and HR.
- [Yext](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yext/): Yext is an enterprise platform for managing brand visibility, listings, and reputation across search engines and AI search.
- [Yoast SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yoast-seo/): Yoast SEO is a WordPress plugin providing real-time on-page content analysis, technical SEO automation, and AI-assisted titles and meta descriptions.
- [You.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/you-com/): AI search engine and assistant offering multi-model chat, deep research, and enterprise-grade web search APIs with real-time, cited answers.
- [YouCanBookMe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youcanbookme/): YouCanBookMe lets businesses build customizable booking pages with calendar sync, payments, and automated reminders.
- [Youform](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youform/): Youform is a free-forever form and quiz builder with an AI form generator, conditional logic, and 6,000+ Zapier integrations.
- [YouTrack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youtrack/): JetBrains' project management and issue tracker, free for teams of up to 10 users.
- [youtube-dl-nas](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youtube-dl-nas/): Open-source dashboard for downloading online videos directly to a NAS, with direct mobile-to-NAS sharing.
- [YugabyteDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yugabytedb/): YugabyteDB is a distributed, PostgreSQL-compatible SQL database for cloud-native apps, available open source or as managed YugabyteDB Aeon.
- [YunoHost](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yunohost/): YunoHost is a free, open-source, self-hosted server system for installing and managing apps with minimal expertise.
- [Zabbix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zabbix/): Open-source enterprise observability platform for unified monitoring of networks, servers, cloud, applications, and IoT/OT devices.
- [Zammad](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zammad/): Open-source (AGPL-3.0) helpdesk platform with AI features, available self-hosted or as German-hosted cloud SaaS.
- [Zamp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zamp/): Zamp is a managed sales tax compliance service combining software with a dedicated tax expert team for registrations, filings, and notices.
- [Zapier](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zapier/): A no-code automation platform connecting thousands of apps via Zaps, with separate product lines for workflow automation, AI agents, and chatbots.
- [Zeabur](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeabur/): Zeabur is a DevOps platform that automates app deployment, server management, and AI model access across multiple cloud providers.
- [Zeda.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeda-io/): Zeda.io is an AI-powered product discovery platform that centralizes customer feedback to generate insights and prioritize roadmaps.
- [Zeeg](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeeg/): Zeeg is scheduling software with an AI voice agent that answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments alongside standard booking pages.
- [Zeek](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeek/): Open-source network security monitoring framework that generates detailed transaction logs of network traffic.
- [Zencal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zencal/): Zencal is a booking platform that handles scheduling, 0%-commission payments, invoicing, and reminders.
- [Zencastr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zencastr/): All-in-one platform for recording, AI editing, hosting, and distributing podcasts and video content.
- [Zendesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zendesk/): An AI-driven customer service platform unifying ticketing, live chat, messaging, and voice support across channels, with AI agents on higher tiers.
- [Zendesk Sell](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zendesk-sell/): Zendesk Sell is a sales CRM for pipeline, contact, call, and email management, with built-in reporting and Zendesk Support integration.
- [Zenko CloudServer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zenko-cloudserver/): Open-source, Amazon S3-compatible object storage server you can self-host on-premises or in Docker.
- [Zenskar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zenskar/): AI-native revenue automation platform for billing, revenue recognition, collections, and usage metering.
- [Zero-K](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zero-k/): Zero-K is a free, open-source real-time strategy game built on the Spring engine, with physics-based unit combat.
- [Zimbra Collaboration](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zimbra-collaboration/): Email and collaboration suite with webmail, calendar, file sharing, and chat, offering a free open-source edition and paid enterprise tiers.
- [Zip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zip/): An AI procurement platform that orchestrates intake-to-pay, sourcing, and vendor risk with governed AI agents.
- [Zipkin](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zipkin/): Open source distributed tracing system originally built at Twitter to troubleshoot latency in microservice architectures.
- [Zitadel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zitadel/): Open-source identity infrastructure platform with hosted login, MFA, and multi-tenancy, free up to 100 daily active users.
- [ZNC](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/znc/): A free, open-source IRC bouncer that stays connected to IRC networks so any client can disconnect and reconnect without losing history.
- [Zoho Books](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-books/): Cloud accounting software for invoicing, expenses, banking, and taxes, built for small businesses and integrated with the Zoho ecosystem.
- [Zoho CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-crm/): Cloud-based CRM with AI-powered sales automation, pipelines, and deep Zoho One integration for teams of any size.
- [Zoho Desk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-desk/): Cloud-based help desk software with AI ticketing, omnichannel support, and self-service tools for teams of every size.
- [Zoho Forms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-forms/): Zoho Forms is a no-code online form builder for creating surveys, registrations, and data-collection forms with AI assistance and workflow automation.
- [Zoho Projects](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-projects/): Cloud-based project management software with task tracking, Gantt charts, time tracking, and team collaboration for businesses of all sizes.
- [Zoho Recruit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-recruit/): Cloud applicant tracking system and recruiting CRM for in-house HR teams and staffing agencies, with AI sourcing, parsing, and screening.
- [Zoho Social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-social/): Zoho Social is a social media management platform for scheduling, monitoring, and analyzing content across major social networks.
- [Zoom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoom/): A unified communications platform for video conferencing, team chat, and phone services across any device.
- [Zoom Phone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoom-phone/): Zoom Phone is a cloud VoIP business phone system with unlimited calling, AI-powered call summaries, and seamless integration with Zoom's meetings and chat.
- [ZoomInfo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoominfo/): ZoomInfo is a go-to-market platform providing verified B2B contact and company data, buying-intent signals, and sales/marketing automation tools.
- [ZOT OCI Registry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zot-oci-registry/): Open-source, vendor-neutral OCI-compliant container image and artifact registry built in Go.
- [Zuddl](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zuddl/): Zuddl is a unified B2B event management platform covering ticketing, virtual/hybrid production, onsite tools, and AI agents.
- [Zulip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zulip/): Open-source team chat app organized around topic-based threads for asynchronous team communication.
- [Zuora](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zuora/): Enterprise subscription management and billing platform for recurring revenue, quoting, invoicing, payments, and revenue recognition.
